source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
	App_name, DB_Name, Export_Day, Export_Doc_Id, Export_hour,Filename, UID, Email_id, Mobile_number,
	Event_code, Event_name, Event_source, Dateadd(Second, Event_time, '1970') as Event_time, Event_type, Event_UUID,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.campaign_channel') 			AS campaign_channel,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.campaign_id')  				AS campaign_id,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.campaign_name')        		AS campaign_name,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.campaign_type')      		AS campaign_type,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.flow_version_id')        	AS flow_version_id,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.flow_version_name')          AS flow_version_name,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_campaign_channel')       AS moe_campaign_channel,
	JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_campaign_content_type')  AS moe_campaign_content_type,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_campaign_tags')        	AS moe_campaign_tags,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_delivery_type')			AS moe_delivery_type,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_f_pid')        			AS moe_f_pid,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_f_pname')				AS moe_f_pname,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moengage_user_id')         	AS moengage_user_id,
	JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_event_category') 		AS moe_event_category,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_event_source')        	AS moe_event_source,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.internal_marketing_id')      AS internal_marketing_id,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.marketing_id')        		AS marketing_id,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_attribution_type')       AS moe_attribution_type,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_campaign_user_type')     AS moe_campaign_user_type,
	JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_flow_action_cids')       AS moe_flow_action_cids,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_flow_conversion_event')  AS moe_flow_conversion_event,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_flow_goal_name')			AS moe_flow_goal_name,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_flow_id')				AS moe_flow_id,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_flow_name')				AS moe_flow_name,
	JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_flow_trip_id')			AS moe_flow_trip_id,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$."Flow Id"')         			AS [Flow Id],
	JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$."Flow Name"')        		AS FlowName,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.flow_type')      			AS flow_type,
	EventAttributes, UserAttributes
from ODS.MOENGAGE_EVENT_RAW_DATA

SELECT 
	case when App_name ='HomeOrg' then 'CTA' end as Division,Event_UUID ,Event_Code, Event_Name, Event_Source, Event_time, Event_type, 
	UID as LeadID, Email_ID as Email, Mobile_number as Phone, 
	APP_Name, DB_Name, EventAttributes, UserAttributes, Campaign_Channel, Campaign_ID, Campaign_name, Campaign_Type, 
	Flow_Version_Id, Flow_Version_Name, MOE_Campaign_channel, MOE_campaign_Content_Type, MOE_Campaign_Tags, MOE_Delivery_Type, MOE_F_PID, MOE_F_Pname,
	MOE_Event_category, MOE_Event_Source, MOE_Attribution_Type, MOE_Campaign_User_Type, MOE_Flow_Action_Cids,MOE_Flow_Conversion_Event, MOE_FLow_Goal_name, MOE_Flow_ID, MOE_Flow_Name,
	MOE_FLow_Name, MOE_Flow_Trip_ID, [Flow ID] as FlowID, FlowName, Flow_Type, MoEngage_user_ID, getdate() as InsertedTS, getdate() as LastUpdatedTS
	from ODS.MOENGAGE_EVENT_DATA

SELECT  
	App_name, DB_Name, Export_Day, Export_Doc_Id, Export_hour,Filename,
	EventAttributes, UserAttributes,
	Event_code, Event_name, Event_source, Dateadd(Second, Event_time, '1970') as Event_time, Event_type, Event_UUID,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.campaign_channel') 			AS campaign_channel,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.campaign_id')  				AS campaign_id,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.campaign_name')        		AS campaign_name,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.campaign_type')      		AS campaign_type,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.flow_version_id')        	AS flow_version_id,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.flow_version_name')          AS flow_version_name,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_campaign_channel')       AS moe_campaign_channel,
	JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_campaign_content_type')  AS moe_campaign_content_type,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_campaign_tags')        	AS moe_campaign_tags,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_delivery_type')			AS moe_delivery_type,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_f_pid')        			AS moe_f_pid,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_f_pname')				AS moe_f_pname,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.lead_id')         			AS lead_id,
	JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_event_category') 		AS moe_event_category,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_event_source')        	AS moe_event_source,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.internal_marketing_id')      AS internal_marketing_id,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.marketing_id')        		AS marketing_id,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_attribution_type')       AS moe_attribution_type,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_campaign_user_type')     AS moe_campaign_user_type,
	JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_flow_action_cids')       AS moe_flow_action_cids,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_flow_conversion_event')  AS moe_flow_conversion_event,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_flow_goal_name')			AS moe_flow_goal_name,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_flow_id')				AS moe_flow_id,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_flow_name')				AS moe_flow_name,
	JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.moe_flow_trip_id')			AS moe_flow_trip_id,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$."Flow Id"')         			AS [Flow Id],
	JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$."Flow Name"')        		AS FlowName,
    JSON_VALUE(EventAttributes, '$.flow_type')      			AS flow_type
from ODS.MOENGAGE_EVENT_RAW_DATA
